payload.answer: I can’t safely generate durable memory repair options from the invalid or unsafe prior proposal. Please provide the original user statement and any existing relevant memory entries to evaluate.
repair_options: Escalate this case to a stronger validation model with the original user input and relevant existing memories.
Reject the unsafe/invalid proposal and make no memory changes.
Ask the user to restate the fact they want remembered before offering repair options.
